evals.name: positive-real-dogfood
evals.prompt: Validate the wisdom notebook of features/002-omo-inspired-v0.6/
evals.expected_behavior: exit 0; report PASS with optional WARN for entry-id gaps from intentional skips
assertions: stdout WARN count >= 1 (gaps acceptable; learn-0005/0006 not assigned)

evals.name: negative-missing-file
evals.prompt: Validate when 4 of 5 notepad files are missing
evals.expected_behavior: exit 1; emit FAIL line naming each missing file
assertions: stdout names at least one of decisions/issues/verification/problems

evals.name: negative-no-delta
evals.prompt: Validate when progress.md claims TASK-002 wisdom delta but no entry exists
evals.expected_behavior: exit 1; emit FAIL line naming TASK-002
assertions: stdout contains 'no entry in learnings.md or verification.md'

evals.name: negative-duplicate-entry-id
evals.prompt: Validate when same entry-id appears twice in one notepad file
evals.expected_behavior: exit 1; emit FAIL line naming the duplicate entry-id

comparison_baseline_note: Without this skill (no validate-wisdom-notebook.py), reviewers would manually grep entry-id duplicates and per-task delta presence, an O(N) cognitive task per closeout. With the skill, hf-completion-gate runs the validator in <300ms and reports issues with task-id-level precision.
